channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mom and dad are both breadwinners in most families for first time
item.description: Data: U.S. Census Current Population Survey data analyzed by Pew ; Chart: Noah Bressner/Axios Just over half of parents in families with a mom and a d...

item.title: American pride has sharply declined
item.description: Data from the PRRI American Identity Survey shows a significant drop in national pride, indicating a deep identity crisis.

item.title: Sewer socialism is spreading across American cities
item.description: A new wave of socialism is emerging in U.S. cities, focusing on practical services rather than ideological dogma.

item.title: MAGA hawk revolt deepens Trump's isolation on Iran
item.description: President Trump's Iran deal has sparked a rebellion among hawkish allies, who see concessions as a threat to national security.
